headlines.description: — With Josh Allen throwing one interception after another, the Buffalo Bills turned to Devin Singletary and their once-neglected running attack.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bills clinch playoff berth, eliminate Falcons with 29-15 win

events.name: New York Giants at Chicago Bears

headlines.description: — Teammates kept asking Robert Quinn when he would set the record and refused to let him forget how close he was.
headlines.shortLinkText: Quinn sets Bears season sacks record in 29-3 rout of Giants

events.name: Kansas City Chiefs at Cincinnati Bengals

headlines.description: — Patrick Mahomes had a message for young Bengals star Ja'Marr Chase when the two met on the field after Cincinnati's dramatic 34-31 win over Kansas City to clinch the AFC North title.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bengals rally past Chiefs 34-31, clinch AFC North title

headlines.description: — The Tennessee Titans are dancing as back-to-back AFC South champs in a season when they lost the NFL's leading rusher at Halloween and have used 88 players — most ever in a...
headlines.shortLinkText: Titans clinch 2nd straight AFC South, beating Miami 34-3

events.name: Las Vegas Raiders at Indianapolis Colts

headlines.description: — Derek Carr and Las Vegas lost a late touchdown on a replay reversal. They surrendered a TD on a fluke play. They committed the only two turnovers of the game.
headlines.shortLinkText: Carr, Raiders beat Colts 23-20 to close in on playoff spot

events.name: Jacksonville Jaguars at New England Patriots

headlines.description: — The Patriots squandered an opportunity to lock up the AFC East title in a humbling loss to the Bills last week.
headlines.shortLinkText: Patriots blow past Jaguars 50-10, earn playoff berth

events.name: Tampa Bay Buccaneers at New York Jets

headlines.description: — Antonio Brown was apparently frustrated and angry. So he walked away.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brown walks away from Bucs; Brady rallies team past Jets

headlines.description: — Jalen Hurts scrambled out of trouble to avoid a handful of sacks and ran the ball when needed with Miles Sanders out.
headlines.shortLinkText: Eagles beat Washington, get help to clinch playoff berth

events.name: Los Angeles Rams at Baltimore Ravens

headlines.description: — When the Los Angeles Rams look back on this important victory, they might recall how Matthew Stafford helped put the team in a quandary with three costly turnovers.
headlines.shortLinkText: Stafford rallies surging Rams past short-handed Ravens 20-19

events.name: Denver Broncos at Los Angeles Chargers

headlines.description: — Justin Herbert and the Los Angeles Chargers are back to controlling their playoff future.
headlines.shortLinkText: Herbert, Roberts propel Chargers back into playoff position

headlines.description: — Coach Kyle Shanahan got back into the locker room after the latest win by the San Francisco 49ers just in time to see New Orleans finish off its own win a couple thousand miles away.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lance throws 2 TD passes to lead 49ers past Texans 23-7

headlines.description: — The troubles for Kyler Murray and the Arizona Cardinals weren't anything that a trip to the star quarterback's favorite stadium couldn't fix.
headlines.shortLinkText: Cards hold off Cowboys 25-22 in matchup of playoff teams

events.name: Carolina Panthers at New Orleans Saints

headlines.description: — Cameron Jordan bolted into the backfield from the left edge of Carolina's offensive line. The Saints defensive end wrapped both arms around Sam Darnold, lifted the Panthers' quarterback off his feet and pulled him to the turf on his side as if they...
headlines.shortLinkText: Jordan, Saints' defense secure 18-10 win over Panthers

headlines.description: — Russell Wilson was the last off the field, waving his arms and stopping to sign a few autographs for the Seahawks fans who lingered in the rain.
headlines.shortLinkText: Penny, Metcalf lead Seahawks to 51-29 blowout of Lions

events.name: Minnesota Vikings at Green Bay Packers

headlines.description: — Aaron Rodgers and the Green Bay Packers once again have made sure they won’t have to leave Lambeau Field for the conference playoffs.
headlines.shortLinkText: Packers rout Vikings 37-10 in cold to take NFC's No. 1 seed
